evaluation.summary: A highly significant NR > QR bias was detected for residues modulo 210, with bias magnitude 0.875 and Z‑score 713, confirming the RMT‑corrected Chebyshev bias.
next_directions: Validate the LDAB model for higher-order bases beyond 210
Apply RMT corrections to other modular patterns and larger moduli
Explore bias scaling across a broader range of x and statistical frameworks
